creator: aksyom@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 164767
Conkeror console output

FreeBSD leno 10.2-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p7 #0: Mon Nov  2 14:19:39 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Using FreeBSD-latest repository: http://pkg.freebsd.org/freebsd:10:x86:64/latest/

Repository build: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds/default:quarterly:101amd64:404468:beefy2

Installed www/xpi-conkeror

Right after starting Conkeror with 'conkeror' command, it crashed gracefully (without dumping core) after printing a lot of warnings and error.

I verified that Conkeror crashes exactly the same way on two of my amd64 machines.

The console output from Conkeror is attached as a file in this PR.

I suggest marking the application broken if it cannot be fixed.
